hero.subtitle: Artys is the first fair streaming platform where every fan who joins earns you monthly income — regardless of stream count.
hero.stat1_body: Streaming has never paid artists fairly and will pay less and less. It's time to change the model and move to Direct To Fans.
hero.stat2_body: You need 1 million streams/month to earn $3,000/month. With Royaltips, you need just 500 Superfans to receive $3,000/month — without being streamed once!

problem.title: Streaming pays you
problem.p1: Streaming generates over $20 billion per year globally. Yet the vast majority of independent artists cannot live from it.
problem.p2: And now, artificial intelligence floods platforms with new tracks every day — mechanically diluting your revenue, even if your audience stays stable.
problem.ia_2: Spotify deleted 75 million 'spam' tracks in one year
problem.ia_3: Deezer reports 50,000 AI uploads per day on its platform
problem.ia_4: Your share of the streaming pool divides mechanically at equal plays
problem.card1_title: The real price of a stream
problem.card1_desc: On average, a stream earns you between $0.003 and $0.006. You need 2 to 4 million monthly plays to reach $1,000 in revenue.
problem.card2_desc: The vast majority of creators capture a tiny fraction of the pie. Revenue concentrates on a limited number of already established artists.
problem.card3_title: The global catalog will double in 3 years
problem.card3_desc: With generative AI, each artist may see their revenue share halved with identical play counts. The per-stream model is doomed.

comparison.title: How much do you really earn with
comparison.subtitle: Compare monthly revenues by model. The result speaks for itself.

backstage.title: Your space.
backstage.subtitle: The Backstage is your exclusive micro community platform. Manage your fans, promote your music with them, and share revenue with those who grow your career.
backstage.feat1_desc: Exclusive posts, private lives, polls, early access content. Your fanbase belongs to you — no algorithm between you.
backstage.feat2_desc: Launch missions for your fans (share, content, recruitment). They become your marketing force — engaged, measurable, rewarded.
backstage.feat3_desc: Fans who grow your Guild receive bonus Royaltips, cash, merch or project access. Engagement becomes a mutual investment.
backstage.feat4_desc: Launch projects (video, EP, drop) with your Guild. Share revenue via smart contract. Your fans become co-producers.

governance.title: Become a
governance.p1: Artys has delegated the governance of its ecosystem to The Ark of Culture — an independent federation bringing together artists, professionals and fans. For the first time, a streaming platform truly shares its power with its members.
governance.p2: By joining the federation, you vote on ecosystem decisions, access exclusive services and help build a fair, transparent music industry governed by those who make it live.

cta_section.subtitle: The superfan economy is here. Artists building their Guild now will be those who thrive in the AI era. Join the movement before the official launch.
cta_section.note: ✦ Orchestrated launch — Join thousands of artists preparing for June 2026
cta_section.field_artist_placeholder: E.g. Aylan K., DJ Pharaoh, Luna…
cta_section.form_success_body: We'll reach out before anyone else at launch. We'll also follow you on your socials — see you soon in the Artys ecosystem ✦
cta_section.form_consent: By signing up, you agree to receive Artys news. Zero spam, unsubscribe in 1 click.

footer.tagline: The first fair streaming platform where artists and fans co-create and co-earn — governed by its members.
